---
applyTo: "**/*.tsx,**/*.ts,**/*.css"
description: "Apply mobile-first responsive design rules for layout, spacing, and component behavior."
---

# Responsive Design Rules

Apply these rules when building or refactoring UI:

- Build mobile-first, then layer breakpoint overrides.
- Use responsive utilities for spacing, typography, and layout.
- Prefer flexible widths and max-width constraints instead of fixed widths.
- Use flex and grid layouts for adaptable structure.
- Ensure content remains usable on small screens without horizontal overflow.
- Verify interaction targets remain usable across viewport sizes.
